arts.ttl: Bristol City-Queens Park Rangers Statistical Preview
arts.sum: Centre-back Luke McNally looked to have set Bristol City on course for an impressive away win against Sunderland last time out before Patrick Roberts pulled things level in stoppage time. Saturday's...

arts.ttl: Bristol City vs QPR predictions: Improving Hoops can offer stiff resistance
arts.sum: Aaron Ashley thinks QPR can come away from Bristol City in the Championship with at least a point.
